name: Chocolate Covered Marshmallow Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill four 9 x 13 inch pans with flour and use the egg to make egg impressions in the flour.
2. Dissolve gelatin in cold water (to soften), then stir in boiling water.
3. Add 2 cups sugar and vanilla; whisk until soft peaks form.
4. Spoon immediately into egg impressions.
Note:  Use dipping chocolate instead of paraffin.
